title: About
paragraphs: I built practical AI systems close to orbital physics - researched detecting orbital maneuvers using machine learning - developed effective algorithms in Orekit for computing collision risks & radar-spacecraft visibilities - and designed deep learning models for time-series forecasting, anomaly detection, and sensor network tasking.

My GitHub is heteroclit and spans reinforcement learning for satellite GNC, anomaly detection, deep clustering, RAG research assistants, litterature summarization, agent cooperation, and even meal planning.
I bring an aerospace engineering approach into machine learning research for SSA: disruptive innovation with careful modeling, strong experimentation, and reproducible pipelines.
